description: CompositionRed, polo neck t-shirt with buttoned chest placket, made of 100% cotton, has appliqué work on left chest, stitch detailing, split hem ends, felt appliqué on the left sleeve and thick inner rib around the neck to absorb excess swearFittingMuscleWash careHand wash separatelyUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingDo not dry in sunlightDo not iron on print/embroideryGo all wet and wild in this red polo neck tee from basics. The appliquéd patches add colossal weight to your persona, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this with jeans or chinos and add on a pair of stylish water-resistant footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to complete your fashion statement, especially during casual outings, brunches or a day at the Sports club.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
